You can useto modify an existing table.
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE;
ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN is_active;
ALTER TABLE users MODIFY COLUMN name VARCHAR(150);
emailMove a Column to the First Position
To move a column (e.g.,) to the first position:
ALTER TABLE users MODIFY COLUMN email VARCHAR(100) FIRST;
To move a column after another column (e.g., moveafter):
ALTER TABLE users MODIFY COLUMN gender ENUM('Male', 'Female', 'Other') AFTER name;
